summary: Identified 3 genuine differentiators for candidate H.: (1) Elite problem-solving (JEE Rank 47/14M) combined with pragmatic business impact ($50k/month savings, 5x budget increase), (2) Founding-to-scale platform ownership—built ML SaaS from scratch to serve Fortune 500 customers, (3) Full-stack AI delivery across LLM/RAG, traditional ML, and UX without handoffs. These differentiators represent rare combinations rather than individual strengths, prioritizing breadth of impact over technical depth. No issues encountered; all differentiators are backed by verifiable evidence.
